title: cytisus arboreus var. tetuanensis
intro: Cytisus arboreus var. tetuanensis, also known as Tetuan broom or Spanish broom, is a deciduous shrub native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cytisus arboreus var. tetuanensis include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a diuretic and astringent. Herbal preparations of Cytisus arboreus var. tetuanensis include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
